name: queenbee-local

metadata.name: queenbee-local
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU Affero General Public License v3
metadata.summary: Queenbee local provides a helper module for running queenbee recipes on desktop

documentation:
# queenbee-local
Queenbee task provides a helper module for running queenbee recipes on a local machine

## Installation
```console
pip install queenbee-local
```

## QuickStart
```python
import queenbee_local

```

modules.name: queenbee_local.helper
documentation: Collection of utility functions.

functions.name: queenbee_local.helper.to_snake_case
documentation:
Return a snake_case string.

NOTE: To be able to handle recipe inputs with capital letters this method doesn't
change the letters to lowercase by default.

functions.name: queenbee_local.helper.parse_input_args
documentation: Parse input arguments for a recipe module.

functions.name: queenbee_local.helper.parse_user_recipe_args
documentation: parse inputs.json recipe inputs provided by user.

functions.name: queenbee_local.helper.update_params
documentation: Update input params based on values provided by user.

functions.name: queenbee_local.helper._copy_artifacts
documentation: copy file or folder.

modules.name: queenbee_local.cli
documentation: Queenbee local command line interface.

functions.name: queenbee_local.cli.local
documentation: Queenbee local plugin.

functions.name: queenbee_local.cli.run_recipe
documentation:
Run a Queenbee local recipe.

 
Args:
    recipe: Path to recipe folder. Recipe folder includes a package.json and a
        run.py file to execute the simulation.
    project_folder: Path to project folder. Project folder includes the input files
        and folders for the recipe.

functions.name: queenbee_local.cli.inputs
documentation:
Create a place-holder inputs.json file for a Queenbee luigi pipeline.

You need to edit this file and overwrite the default values before passing it to
`queenbee local run` command.

Args:

: recipe: Path to a recipe folder.

modules.name: queenbee_local
documentation:
Utility Luigi object for Queenbee local execution.

QueenbeeTask is a wrapper around luigi.Task which is used by queenbee-local to
execute Queenbee-specific task. You probably don't need to use this module in your code.

functions.name: queenbee_local.load_input_param
documentation:
This function tries to import the values from a file as a Task input
    parameter.

It first tries to import the content as a dictionary assuming the input file is
a JSON file. If the import as JSON fails it will import the content as string and
split them by next line. If there are several items it will return a list,
otherwise it will return a single item.

functions.name: queenbee_local.local_scheduler
documentation:
Check if luigi Daemon is running.

If it does then return False otherwise return True.

classes.name: queenbee_local.QueenbeeTask

methods.name: queenbee_local.QueenbeeTask._get_log_folder
documentation: A hack to find the log file!

methods.name: queenbee_local.QueenbeeTask.input_artifacts
documentation:
Task's input artifacts.

These artifacts will be copied to execution folder before executing the command.

methods.name: queenbee_local.QueenbeeTask.output_artifacts
documentation:
Task's output artifacts.

These artifacts will be copied to study folder from execution folder after the
task is done.

methods.name: queenbee_local.QueenbeeTask.output_parameters
documentation:
Task's output parameters.

These parameters will be copied to study folder from execution folder after the
task is done.

methods.name: queenbee_local.QueenbeeTask.command
documentation:
An executable command which will be passed to subprocess.Popen

Overwrite this method.

methods.name: queenbee_local.QueenbeeTask._copy_script
documentation:
Render and copy the template script to dst folder.

Args:
    dst: Execution folder.

methods.name: queenbee_local.QueenbeeTask._copy_input_artifacts
documentation:
Copy input artifacts to destination folder.

Args:
    dst: Execution folder.

methods.name: queenbee_local.QueenbeeTask._create_optional_output_artifacts
documentation:
Create a dummy place holder for optional output artifacts.

Args:
    dst: Execution folder

methods.name: queenbee_local.QueenbeeTask._copy_output_artifacts
documentation:
Copy output artifacts to project folder.

Args:
    src: Execution folder.

methods.name: queenbee_local.QueenbeeTask._copy_output_parameters
documentation:
Copy output parameters to project folder.

Args:
    src: Execution folder.

methods.name: queenbee_local.QueenbeeTask.load_input_param
documentation:
A static class kept here for backwards compatibility.

Use the `load_input_param` function directly instead.

methods.name: queenbee_local.QueenbeeTask._update_status
documentation: Update run status.

A Luigi task to run a single command as a subprocess.

Luigi has a subclass for running external programs

https://luigi.readthedocs.io/en/stable/api/luigi.contrib.external_program.html
https://github.com/spotify/luigi/blob/master/luigi/contrib/external_program.py

But:
    * It doesn't allow setting up the environment for the command
    * It doesn't support piping
    * It doesn't support progress reporting

QueenbeeTask:

    * simplifies the process of writing commands
    * captures stdin / stdout
    * supports piping
